comments.body:
> Are we still using `[skip-ci]` on PRs?

It still works, but its use is not recommended. In this case, however, it makes sense to skip Cirrus CI.

For github action VERSION updates it is generally ok as there is little value in trigger cirrus on this content and I don't see how this update would fail cirrus.

However if you actually edit the content then we should not use it as a typo or whitespace might get flagged by cirrus validation.
